Name: Average time from Manuscript Export Succeeded to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time between Manuscript Export Succeeded and SW-Reviewer Agreed across all variants containing both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after Manuscript Export Succeeded in variants where both are present
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average duration of the interval starting at Manuscript Export Succeeded and ending at the first occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed, considering only cases that eventually reach SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time elapsed from Manuscript Export Succeeded to SW-Awaiting AE Assignment in variants that do not contain SW-Reviewer Agreed, compared to those that do
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Average time from Manuscript Export Succeeded to Plagiarism Originality Report Completed, as a baseline for early-stage processing duration
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'

Name: Total resolution time of Manuscript Export Succeeded when followed by SW-Reviewer Agreed versus when followed by SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time between Manuscript Export Succeeded and SW-Initial Reviewer Selection in variants leading to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Average time it takes for Manuscript Export Succeeded to be followed by any reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-Initial Reviewer Selection, SW-AE Assign Reviewers) in cases that eventually result in SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Elapsed time from Manuscript Export Succeeded to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in complete review cycles that include SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time from Manuscript Export Succeeded to SW-Checklist Completed in variants where SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs, highlighting pre-review preparation efficiency
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Average time between Manuscript Export Succeeded and the next system-generated activity in variants that lead to SW-Reviewer Agreed, indicating system responsiveness
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Total time from Manuscript Export Succeeded to Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation in multi-round review processes initiated after SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Minimum time from Manuscript Export Succeeded to SW-AE Assign Reviewers in high-frequency variants containing SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Time of Manuscript Export Succeeded as a standalone event duration (i.e., zero, since it is instantaneous), used as a reference point for downstream timing analysis relative to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Manuscript Export Succeeded and the end of the case
